ddls:
CREATE TABLE "citizens" (
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the citizen */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the citizen */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the citizen (M for Male, F for Female) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the citizen resides */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the citizen resides */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the citizen resides */,
  "national_id" TEXT /* Unique national identification number for each citizen */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the citizen */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the citizen */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the citizen */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the citizen (e.g., Single, Married, Divorced) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the citizen */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citizen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the department */,
  "area_square_km" REAL /* Area of the department in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the province is located */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "area_square_km" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the province */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "area_square_km" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
